projectDescription: An interactive Mapbox-powered map that plots hand-drawn sketchbook pages and real-world type specimen photos at their geographic locations, with a drag-and-drop admin panel and automated image processing pipeline.
keyFeatures: Interactive Mapbox GL JS dark map with sketch thumbnail markers
Toggle between Sketchbooks and Type Specimens collections
Guided tour mode cycling through cities with sketches
Drag-and-drop admin panel for placing sketches on the map
Automated image processing pipeline (thumbnail generation via cwebp)
GPS EXIF extraction for automatic type photo geolocation
City-based marker clustering with zoom-to-expand behavior
GitHub Pages deployment via GitHub Actions with secret injection
publicApiSurface: GET /admin — Admin panel for placing and uploading content
POST /api/save-data — Save sketch location data to data.json
POST /api/upload — Upload and process a sketch or type photo image
data.json — Sketch location database (id, filename, coordinates, title, date)
type-photos/locations.json — Type photo GPS database (latitude, longitude, altitude_m, date)
scripts/process-sketches.py — Process and register new sketch images
scripts/process-type-photos.py — Extract GPS EXIF and register type photos
scripts/build-config.js — Generate config.js from MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN env var
